result.evidence_summary: The official website idreclassic.se provides detailed event information including course maps (bansträckning), participant info, and post-race details. The Swedish Ski Association site ssfta.skidor.com lists Idre Classic as an event on 11 April 2026 with registration and results access. Idre Fjäll's site hosts cross-country competitions, supporting the location. No direct news or YouTube found in results, but official site and association listing confirm organization.
